name: How to Add Your Business Listing in DiscoverOurTown.com?
description: Learn how to add your business to DiscoverOurTown.com with this step-by-step guide from Synup. Increase your online visibility and reach a wider audience by adding your business to this popular directory.
main_title: How to Add Your Business Listing in DiscoverOurTown.com?
richtext:
If you are looking for a way to increase your online visibility, adding your business listing in DiscoverOurTown.com can be a great option. This website is an online directory that provides information about businesses, events, and attractions in different towns and cities across the United States. By adding your business listing on this platform, you can reach a wider audience and improve your online presence.

‍

Step-by-Step Guide to add your business listing in DiscoverOurTown.com?

‍

Step 1: Go to the DiscoverOurTown.com website 

‍

Step 2: Navigate & click  "Add Your Business" text link from footer navigation.

‍

Step 3: Fill out the required fields, including your business name, address, phone number, website, and a brief description of your business.

‍

Step 4: Select the category that best fits your business, then click the "Add Your Business" button.

‍

Step 5: Once all the field inputs are updated, enable the reCAPTCHA and click ‘Continue’.

‍

Step 6: Choose a listing package and make payment, if applicable.

‍

Step 7: Review your listing information for accuracy, then submit it for approval.

‍

By following these simple steps, you can add your business listing in DiscoverOurTown.com and increase your online visibility. This can help attract more customers and improve your business's overall success.

‍

After filling in all the necessary information, make sure to preview your listing to ensure that all the information is accurate and up-to-date. Once you are satisfied with your listing, submit it for review. DiscoverOurTown.com will review your listing and approve it within 24-48 hours.

‍
